Who I Am

DETAIL-DRIVEN.
CREATIVE.
RESULTS-FOCUSED.

I am a versatile professional with 3 years of experience providing virtual and onsite support in customer service, project coordination, administrative tasks, construction, and financial services.

Skilled in 2D/3D drafting, graphic design, social media management, mortgage documentation, logistics tracking, and technical support — I deliver organized, accurate, and solution-focused results across every project.
